name: PRISONCALL - WF7 SIP Channel Capacity Monitor

parameters.content:
## Workflow 7 - SIP Channel Capacity Monitor
Runs hourly. Gets VoipLine balance/channel usage via the proxy (GET /api/customer/core/balance).

- **>= 3 concurrent** (>75% of 4 channels): SMS owner scale-UP advisory.
- **< 2 concurrent** (<50%): SMS owner scale-DOWN-possible advisory.
- NEVER auto-purchases channels - owner decision only.

At live integration: persist the last advisory and only send on change to avoid hourly repeats.
